paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.32 as of July 23, 2026, with a decrease of 3.95 percent from the prior close and a decrease of 20.9 percent over the last 21 sessions. There have been 2 new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include "Draining the Ogallala Aquifer for AI? Project Matador and the myth of limitless growth" from Environment America and "Project Matador: World’s largest AI data center coming to Panhandle" from NewsChannel 10 on MSN, both of which discuss Project Matador, a 17-gigawatt private power and AI campus being built in the Texas Panhandle.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including the appointment of four new officers, the resignation of director Miles Everson, and the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Additionally, there has been one Form 4 filing and 16 proxy solicitation filings, with a total of 25 filings in the feed.
